caption:
Women's looks of the week!

Two looks, one week, endless ways to wear the season in.
Swipe between the bold and the bare — because some weeks call for gold-threaded armour, and others for the quietest linen you've ever felt against your skin. That's the beauty of a new season: it doesn't ask you to choose who you are just yet.

Slide 1 — Gold lurex jacket & pants: @siyuline | Scarf: @mirrorintheskycashmere
Slide 2 — Hoodie, top & wide pants: @la_haine_inside_us
